_comment: State file for the product-digest skill (The Digest — Product Edition, monthly). Read at the start of every run; written ONLY on publish — test runs never pollute trend_history. Updated on the Issue 1 publish (2026-06-12).

trend_history.this_month_development: Same-day 10 Jun double-header: Visa Agent Score / Agentic Directory / LTM + Visa-OpenAI partnership; Mastercard Agent Pay for Machines (30+ partners, multi-rail). Zero mentions of offers/rewards across the three releases.

trend_history.trend: Pay by Bank / A2A goes operational
trend_history.this_month_development: UKPI commercial VRP scheme live 2 Jun (first new UK scheme since 2008, 31 firms; Wave 2 e-commerce H2 2026); GoCardless Recurring Pay by Bank on day one; TrueLayer Bank on File carried the scheme's first live payments (3 Jun).

trend_history.trend: OS wallet as the loyalty surface
trend_history.this_month_development: iOS 27 Wallet (WWDC, 10 Jun): camera-scan any loyalty card, Tap to Share loyalty identity in-store; ships ~Sept. Supporting: Visa Flexible Credential UK on Zilch (12 May, near-window, disclosed).
Chase UK 2% cashback behaviour-conditional from 1 Jun (15 transactions/DDs + £1,000 in savings); Nationwide £100 Fairer Share confirmed 21 May (£440m to 4.4m members, paid 10-30 Jun).

roadmap_threads_history.thread: A2A coverage gap — recurring payments under UKPI produce no card transaction for card-linked offers to read
Loyalty absent from the agent rails — agentic trust layer specified with no offers/rewards object
